mitigations.mitigation_name: Disable attack binary (remove execute permission from /usr/sbin/hping3) on compromised host to stop ICMP flood

args.command: ps aux | grep hping3 | grep -v grep || pgrep -a hping3 || echo 'no_hping3_process'
if ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2; then echo "LAN_REACHABLE:true"; else echo "LAN_REACHABLE:false"; fi

mitigations.mitigation_name: Temporarily drop ICMP to the attack target on UbuntuComputer (iptables OUTPUT drop to 7.0.14.254) to immediately stop the flood

args.command: iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -d 7.0.14.254 -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "port2"
set srcaddr "Compromised_Host"
set dstaddr "all"
set protocol icmp
set icmp-rate 50
set action drop
next
end
